data.title: Abu Dhabi’s Phoenix Group Launches $150M Bitcoin, Solana Reserve in Regional First
data.description:
Phoenix Group has unveiled a $150 million strategic crypto reserve, making it the first firm on the Abu Dhabi Securities Exchange to hold a digital asset treasury.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/abu-dhabis-phoenix-group-launches-150m-bitcoin-solana-reserve-in-regional-first/

data.title: 2025 Crypto Lawsuits Nearly Match Entire 2024 Total in Just Six Months, Cornerstone Research Reports
data.description:
Cryptocurrency-related lawsuits in the United States have surged dramatically in 2025, with six cases filed during the first half approaching the total of seven lawsuits recorded throughout all of 2024.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/2025-crypto-lawsuits-nearly-match-entire-2024-total-in-just-six-months-cornerstone-research-reports/

data.title: Federal Reserve Keeps Rates at 4.25%-4.5%, September Cut Odds Drop – Crypto Bull Run Over?
data.description:
The Federal Reserve maintained interest rates at 4. 25%-4. 5% on July 30, marking the fifth consecutive meeting without change, while two governors dissented in favor of cuts for the first time since 1993.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/federal-reserve-keeps-rates-at-4-25-4-5-september-cut-odds-drop-crypto-bull-run-over/

data.title: Deutsche Bank-backed EURAU stablecoin launch: Key things to know
data.description:
AllUnity’s EURAU stablecoin launches as euro-denominated stablecoins account for just 0. 2% of the stablecoin market despite surging 60% since late 2024.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/eurau-stablecoin-allunity-launch-key-things-to-know?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ethereum rally expected to continue due to limited pressure from unrealized profits
data.description:
ETH may have a larger upside, as whales are sitting on lower unrealized gains. Robust spot demand and a short squeeze may extend the ETH rally, while even BTC and other altcoins stall.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereum-rally-no-pressure-unrealized-profit/

source: https://www.fxstreet.com/cryptocurrencies/news/pi-network-price-forecast-pi-targets-all-time-low-ahead-of-major-token-unlock-202507310936

data.description:

source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/99-percent-of-cfos-plan-to-use-crypto-two-years?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Circle says native USDC and CCTP v2 are coming to Hyperliquid
data.description:
Circle will bring native USDC and CCTP v2 to Hyperliquid, shifting the DEX from bridged dollars to directly issued USDC with 1:1 cross-chain transfers.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/365036/circle-native-usdc-cctp-hyperliquid?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Wall Street's Shift to Alternative Assets Amid Stock Market Concerns
data.description: According to Foresight News, Bitwise Chief Investment Officer Matt Hougan has analyzed the reasons behind Wall Street's promotion of alternative assets such as private equity, private credit, and cryptocurrencies. Hougan suggests that this shift is largely due to Wall Street's pessimistic outlook on stock market returns. He notes that while stocks carry significant risks, the additional returns they offer are minimal.

data.title: SharpLink Gaming acquires $43.57M in Ethereum, boosts treasury to $1.73B
data.description:

The transaction, executed within the last 34 minutes via Galaxy Digital, was first reported by Lookonchain on X, highlighting a transfer of 11
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/sharplink-gaming-acquires-43-57m-in-ethereum-boosts-treasury-to-1-73b/
